case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MORENO, AMANDA D. AKA CARNEY, AMANDA D. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, AMANDA D.  AKA  CARNEY, AMANDA D. CARNEY, AMANDA D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
